title: UniBond No More Nails Heavy Objects Construction Adhesive, Grab Adhesive, High Strength Bonding, No Nails Required, White, 440 g Cartridge
features: Extra high strength - This super strong no nails glue construction adhesive provides extra high strength quality bonding and sealing solutions, holding up to 350kg per m2

Universal applicability - Suitable for fixing most common building materials inside and outside the house including as a brick, stone and tile adhesive; it's also suitable as a glass and wood adhesive
Highly flexible and solvent free - The strong adhesion created by this No More Nails Adhesive also provides high flexibility in the join and is solvent free
Extreme resistance - This No More Nails adhesive is waterproof, UV ray resistant, as well as extreme temperature resistant (-30°C to + 80°C)
Delivery Scope and details - Unibond No More Nails Heavy Objects white construction adhesive in standard cartridge (440g), 1 cartridge, article number: B087VK18GT
